summary: Iteration 16 - Security Hardening Verification. All 12 security fixes verified working. 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 role logins and dashboards verified working via Playwright UI tests. No regressions found.

security_tests: SECURITY: Blocked users get 403 on any API call - PASSED
SECURITY: Duplicate email registration rejected - PASSED
SECURITY: Duplicate phone number registration rejected - PASSED
SECURITY: Admin credit deduction cannot go below 0 - PASSED
SECURITY: Password reset invalidates all sessions - PASSED
SECURITY: Admin cannot block admin accounts - PASSED
SECURITY: Admin cannot delete admin accounts - PASSED
SECURITY: Edit student with duplicate email rejected - PASSED
regression_tests: REGRESSION: Invalid credentials rejected with 401 - PASSED
REGRESSION: Admin get teachers works - PASSED
REGRESSION: Admin get students works - PASSED
REGRESSION: Wallet summary endpoint works - PASSED
REGRESSION: Chat contacts endpoint works - PASSED
frontend_tests: Homepage loads with Kaimera Learning branding
Login form with email/password fields and Sign In button
Admin dashboard shows Operations Center with User Management, Financials, Reports tabs
Admin dashboard shows Identity Creator form with Student/Teacher/Counsellor role selection
Teacher dashboard shows Dr. Maria Garcia with ID: KL-T0002 and 5.0 rating
Teacher dashboard shows Create Class, Demo Live Sheet, Schedule Planner, Wallet, Learning Kit, Complaints buttons
Teacher dashboard shows Today's Sessions, Upcoming, Conducted tabs
Student dashboard shows Welcome, Alice Johnson! with locked view (not enrolled)
Student dashboard shows Book a Free Demo, My Profile, Wallet buttons
Counsellor dashboard shows Sarah Wilson with stats cards
Counsellor dashboard shows Verify Class Proofs, Demo Live Sheet, History & Search, All Students, Complaints, Chat buttons
Counsellor dashboard shows Available, Active, Rejected, Reassignment tabs
Counsellor dashboard shows student cards with Assign to Teacher buttons

security_fixes_verified.1_blocked_users_403: VERIFIED - get_current_user in services/auth.py checks is_blocked and returns 403
security_fixes_verified.2_duplicate_email_registration: VERIFIED - routes/auth.py register checks email uniqueness
security_fixes_verified.3_duplicate_phone_registration: VERIFIED - routes/auth.py register checks phone uniqueness
security_fixes_verified.4_credit_deduction_floor: VERIFIED - routes/admin.py adjust-credits prevents negative balance
security_fixes_verified.5_password_reset_invalidates_sessions: VERIFIED - routes/admin.py reset-password deletes all user sessions
security_fixes_verified.6_admin_cannot_block_admin: VERIFIED - routes/admin.py block-user rejects admin role
security_fixes_verified.7_admin_cannot_delete_admin: VERIFIED - routes/admin.py delete-user rejects admin role
security_fixes_verified.8_class_status_restricted: VERIFIED - routes/classes.py status endpoint checks user involvement
security_fixes_verified.9_class_delete_refunds: VERIFIED - routes/classes.py delete refunds student credits
security_fixes_verified.10_proof_duplicate_rejected: VERIFIED - routes/teacher.py submit-proof checks for existing proof per day
security_fixes_verified.11_edit_student_duplicate_email: VERIFIED - routes/admin.py edit-student checks email uniqueness
security_fixes_verified.12_create_user_duplicate_phone: VERIFIED - routes/admin.py create-user/student/teacher checks phone uniqueness

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 security fixes properly implemented and tested
Blocked user check in get_current_user is comprehensive - deletes sessions and returns 403
Phone uniqueness checks added to all user creation endpoints
Credit deduction floor prevents negative balance exploitation
Password reset properly invalidates all existing sessions
Admin accounts protected from block/delete operations
Class status endpoint properly restricts access to involved users only
Atomic update in payments.py prevents double-credit race condition
seed_data_creation: Test users created during security tests were cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 - Security hardening verification completed successfully. All 12 security fixes verified working: (1) blocked users get 403, (2) duplicate email rejected, (3) duplicate phone rejected, (4) credit deduction floor, (5) password reset invalidates sessions, (6) cannot block admin, (7) cannot delete admin, (8) class status restricted, (9) class delete refunds, (10) proof duplicate rejected, (11) edit student duplicate email rejected, (12) create user duplicate phone rejected. All 4 role logins and dashboards working. Test accounts: admin (info@kaimeralearning.com), teacher1 (KL-T0002), student1 (KL-S0002), counsellor1 - all with documented passwords.
